_meta.note: Hand-curated data based on IHI0029. Priority components: ETM v4/ETE, CTI, STM, ITM. Common ID block included.

registers.name: TRCPRGCTLR
registers.title: Programming Control Register
registers.brief: Controls whether the ETM trace unit is enabled. Must be programmed only when TRCSTATR.IDLE=1.

fields.name: EN
fields.brief: Trace Enable. Enables trace when 1. Trace only occurs when TRCSTATR.IDLE=0.

registers.name: TRCSTATR
registers.title: Trace Status Register
registers.brief: Read-only status of the trace unit. Poll IDLE before programming the ETM.

fields.name: PMSTABLE
fields.brief: Power Management Stable. Power management state is stable. Poll before programming the ETM.

fields.name: IDLE
fields.brief: Trace Unit Idle. Indicates trace unit is idle (not tracing). Read before programming.

registers.name: TRCCONFIGR
registers.title: Trace Configuration Register
registers.brief: Configures the ETM trace options including branch broadcast, cycle counting, context ID, VMID, and timestamps.

fields.name: DV
fields.brief: Data Value Tracing Enable. Enable data value tracing (ETMv4 only).

fields.name: DA
fields.brief: Data Address Tracing Enable. Enable data address tracing (ETMv4 only).

fields.name: RS
fields.brief: Return Stack Enable. Enable the return stack for function return prediction.

fields.name: TS
fields.brief: Timestamp Period. Timestamp frequency: 0b0000=disabled, other values set period.

fields.name: VMID
fields.brief: VMID Trace Enable. Enable VMID comparator tracing.

fields.name: CID
fields.brief: Context ID Trace Enable. Enable Context ID comparator tracing.

fields.name: CCI
fields.brief: Cycle Count Instruction Enable. Enable cycle count instruction trace.

fields.name: BB
fields.brief: Branch Broadcast Enable. Enable branch broadcast mode. All taken branches are traced.

registers.name: TRCAUXCTLR
registers.title: Auxiliary Control Register
registers.brief: Implementation-defined auxiliary control. Usage varies by ETM implementation.

registers.name: TRCVICTLR
registers.title: ViewInst Main Control Register
registers.brief: Controls which instruction trace is included in the ViewInst filter, including exception level masking.

fields.name: EXLEVEL_S
fields.brief: Exception Level Control S. Bit mask of Secure exception levels to trace: [0]=EL0, [1]=EL1, [2]=EL2, [3]=EL3.

fields.name: EXLEVEL_NS
fields.brief: Exception Level Control NS. Bit mask of NS exception levels to trace: [0]=EL0, [1]=EL1, [2]=EL2, [3]=EL3.

fields.name: TRCEXC
fields.brief: Trace Exception Entry. Enable tracing of exception entry.

fields.name: TRCRESET
fields.brief: Trace Reset. Enable tracing of resets.

fields.name: TRCERR
fields.brief: Trace System Error. Enable tracing of system errors.

registers.name: TRCIDR0
registers.title: ID Register 0
registers.brief: Read-only register identifying ETM features including P0 tracing, data tracing, and timestamp size.

fields.name: TSSIZE
fields.brief: Timestamp Size. Size of global timestamp in bits minus 1.

fields.name: TRCDATA
fields.brief: Data Tracing. Indicates data tracing support.

fields.name: INSTP0
fields.brief: P0 Instructions. Indicates P0 instruction tracing support.

registers.name: CTICONTROL
registers.title: CTI Control Register
registers.brief: Globally enables or disables the CTI. When disabled all cross-trigger propagation is suppressed.

fields.name: GLBEN
fields.brief: Global Enable. Enables the CTI. When 0, all cross-triggers are disabled.

registers.name: CTIINTACK
registers.title: CTI Interrupt Acknowledge Register
registers.brief: Write-only register to acknowledge (clear) latched trigger inputs.

fields.name: INTACK
fields.brief: Interrupt Acknowledge. Write 1 to bit n to acknowledge trigger input n.

registers.name: CTIAPPSET
registers.title: CTI Application Channel Set Register
registers.brief: Write 1 to bit n to assert channel n from software. Read returns currently asserted channels.

fields.name: APPSET
fields.brief: Application Channel Set. Write 1 to bit n to set channel n. Read returns current set channels.

registers.name: CTIAPPCLEAR
registers.title: CTI Application Channel Clear Register
registers.brief: Write 1 to bit n to deassert software-asserted channel n.

fields.name: APPCLEAR
fields.brief: Application Channel Clear. Write 1 to bit n to clear channel n.

registers.name: CTIAPPPULSE
registers.title: CTI Application Pulse Register
registers.brief: Write 1 to bit n to generate a single-cycle pulse on channel n.

fields.name: APPULSE
fields.brief: Application Pulse. Write 1 to bit n to pulse channel n for one clock cycle.

registers.name: CTIINEN<n>
registers.title: CTI Trigger In to Channel Enable Register n
registers.brief: Maps trigger input n to one or more channels. Bit k enables channel k for input n.

fields.name: TRIGINEN
fields.brief: Trigger In Enable. Bit mask of channels enabled for trigger input n: [0]=CH0, [1]=CH1, [2]=CH2, [3]=CH3.

registers.name: CTIOUTEN<n>
registers.title: CTI Trigger Out from Channel Enable Register n
registers.brief: Maps channels to trigger output n. Bit k enables channel k to drive output n.

fields.name: TRIGOUTEN
fields.brief: Trigger Out Enable. Bit mask of channels enabled for trigger output n.

registers.name: CTITRIGINSTATUS
registers.title: CTI Trigger In Status Register
registers.brief: Read-only, unlatched view of the current state of each trigger input line.

fields.name: TRIGINSTATUS
fields.brief: Trigger In Status. Current status of trigger inputs (unlatched).

registers.name: CTITRIGOUTSTATUS
registers.title: CTI Trigger Out Status Register
registers.brief: Read-only view of each trigger output after channel-to-output enable masking.

fields.name: TRIGOUTSTATUS
fields.brief: Trigger Out Status. Current status of trigger outputs (after enable masking).

registers.name: CTICHINSTATUS
registers.title: CTI Channel In Status Register
registers.brief: Read-only view of the current state of each internal channel input.

fields.name: CTICHIN
fields.brief: Channel In Status. Current status of channel inputs.

registers.name: CTICHOUTSTATUS
registers.title: CTI Channel Out Status Register
registers.brief: Read-only view of the current state of each internal channel output.

fields.name: CTICHOUT
fields.brief: Channel Out Status. Current status of channel outputs.

registers.name: CTIGATE
registers.title: CTI Channel Gate Enable Register
registers.brief: Controls propagation of each channel. Clear a bit to prevent that channel from activating trigger outputs.

fields.name: CTIGATEEN
fields.brief: Channel Gate Enable. Enable propagation of each channel: 1=enabled, 0=gated off.

registers.name: STMSPER
registers.title: STM Stimulus Port Enable Register
registers.brief: Bit n enables stimulus port n (ports 0-31). Write 1 to enable a port.

fields.name: SPER
fields.brief: Stimulus Port Enable. Bit n enables stimulus port n (0-31). Write 1 to enable.

registers.name: STMSPMSCR
registers.title: STM Stimulus Port Master Select Control Register
registers.brief: Selects the master ID inserted into trace packets when STMSPOVERIDER.SPOVERRIDE=1.

fields.name: MASTSEL
fields.brief: Master Select. Master ID used when SPOVERRIDE=1 in STMSPOVERIDER.

registers.name: STMSPOVERIDER
registers.title: STM Stimulus Port Override Register
registers.brief: Overrides the master ID for all stimulus ports to the value in STMSPMSCR.MASTSEL.

fields.name: MSTREN
fields.brief: Master Enable. Enable master ID override.

fields.name: SPOVERRIDE
fields.brief: Override Enable. When 1, use MASTSEL from STMSPMSCR for all stimulus ports.

registers.name: STMHEMCR
registers.title: STM HW Event Master Control Register
registers.brief: Master control register for the STM. Controls enable, compression, synchronization, and timestamp insertion.

fields.name: TSEN
fields.brief: Global Timestamp Enable. Enable global timestamp insertion.

fields.name: SYNCEN
fields.brief: Synchronization Enable. Enable periodic synchronization packets.

fields.name: EN
fields.brief: Enable. Enable the STM. When 0, no trace is generated.

registers.name: STMFEAT0
registers.title: STM Features Register 0
registers.brief: Read-only register indicating STM capabilities including protection, timestamp, synchronization, and tracing modes.

fields.name: TRACING
fields.brief: Tracing Mode. Indicates tracing mode support.

fields.name: TS
fields.brief: Timestamp Encoding. Indicates timestamp encoding support.

fields.name: PROT
fields.brief: Protection Level. Indicates stimulus port protection level support.

registers.name: STIM<n>
registers.title: Stimulus Register n
registers.brief: Write to generate a software trace packet. Read returns FIFO status: 1=ready to accept data, 0=busy.

fields.name: STIMULUS
fields.brief: Stimulus Data. Write data to generate trace packet. Read returns FIFO status: 1=ready, 0=busy.

registers.name: TER
registers.title: Trace Enable Register
registers.brief: Enables individual ITM stimulus ports. Bit n enables port n.

fields.name: STIMENA
fields.brief: Stimulus Enable. Bit n enables stimulus port n: 1=enabled, 0=disabled.

registers.name: TPR
registers.title: Trace Privilege Register
registers.brief: Controls unprivileged access to groups of 8 stimulus ports. Bit n gates ports 8n–8n+7.

fields.name: PRIVMASK
fields.brief: Privilege Mask. Bit n controls unprivileged access to stimulus ports 8n–8n+7: 0=privileged only, 1=unprivileged allowed.

registers.name: TCR
registers.title: Trace Control Register
registers.brief: Master control for the ITM including enable, timestamps, DWT forwarding, SWO mode, and ATB bus ID.

fields.name: TraceBusID
fields.brief: ATB Bus ID. 7-bit ATB bus ID for this ITM. Must be unique across the trace system.

fields.name: TSPrescale
fields.brief: Timestamp Prescaler. Local timestamp prescaler: 0b00=no prescale, 0b01=÷4, 0b10=÷16, 0b11=÷64.

fields.name: SWOENA
fields.brief: SWO Encoding Enable. Enable SWO (Single Wire Output) encoding.

fields.name: TXENA
fields.brief: DWT Packet Forwarding Enable. Enable DWT stimulus to ITM forwarding.

fields.name: SYNCENA
fields.brief: Sync Packet Enable. Enable synchronization packet transmission.

fields.name: TSENA
fields.brief: Timestamp Enable. Enable local timestamp generation.

fields.name: ITMENA
fields.brief: ITM Enable. Master enable for ITM. Must be 1 for any trace.

registers.name: DEVARCH
registers.title: Device Architecture Register
registers.brief: Identifies the CoreSight architecture of the component. Only present in CoreSight Architecture v3.

fields.name: ARCHITECT
fields.brief: Architect. JEP106 code of the architect (0x23B=ARM).

fields.name: ARCHID
fields.brief: Architecture ID. CoreSight architecture ID for this component.

registers.name: DEVID
registers.title: Device ID Register
registers.brief: Implementation-defined device identification. Content varies by component.

registers.name: DEVTYPE
registers.title: Device Type Identifier Register
registers.brief: Classifies the component by major and sub type to allow ROM table parsers to identify the component.

fields.name: SUB
fields.brief: Sub Type. Sub-type qualification of major type.

fields.name: MAJOR
fields.brief: Major Type. Major component type: 0x1=Trace sink, 0x2=Trace link, 0x3=Trace source, 0x4=Debug control, 0x5=Debug logic.

registers.name: AUTHSTATUS
registers.title: Authentication Status Register
registers.brief: Reports the current debug authentication state for invasive and non-invasive, secure and non-secure debug.

registers.name: PIDR4
registers.title: Peripheral ID Register 4
registers.brief: Contains the JEP106 continuation code and the 4 KB page count for this component.

fields.name: SIZE
fields.brief: Memory size. Number of 4 KB pages used: 0=1 page.

registers.name: PIDR0
registers.title: Peripheral ID Register 0
registers.brief: Contains bits[7:0] of the 12-bit part number for this component.

fields.name: PART_0
fields.brief: Part Number[7:0]. Bits[7:0] of the part number.

registers.name: PIDR1
registers.title: Peripheral ID Register 1
registers.brief: Contains bits[11:8] of the part number and bits[3:0] of the JEP106 identity code.

fields.name: DES_0
fields.brief: JEP106 ID[3:0]. Bits[3:0] of the JEP106 identity code.

fields.name: PART_1
fields.brief: Part Number[11:8]. Bits[11:8] of the part number.

registers.name: PIDR2
registers.title: Peripheral ID Register 2
registers.brief: Contains bits[6:4] of the JEP106 identity code, the JEDEC flag, and the component revision.

fields.name: DES_1
fields.brief: JEP106 ID[6:4]. Bits[6:4] of the JEP106 identity code.

registers.name: PIDR3
registers.title: Peripheral ID Register 3
registers.brief: Contains the customer modification field and metal-fix revision.

registers.name: CIDR0
registers.title: Component ID Register 0
registers.brief: Preamble byte 0. Fixed value 0x0D identifies a valid CoreSight component.

fields.name: PRMBL_0
fields.brief: Preamble[7:0]. Value 0x0D identifies a valid CoreSight component.

registers.name: CIDR1
registers.title: Component ID Register 1
registers.brief: Preamble byte 1 and component class. CLASS=0x9 for CoreSight components.

registers.name: CIDR2
registers.title: Component ID Register 2
registers.brief: Preamble byte 2. Fixed value 0x05.

registers.name: CIDR3
registers.title: Component ID Register 3
registers.brief: Preamble byte 3. Fixed value 0xB1.
